name: 语法陷阱训练营 · 第一辑（八类陷阱）
desc: 纯初二及以上 · 八类中考高频陷阱 · 答案唯一无争议。m1 识别口诀配对，m4/m5 陷阱选择。

m1: 看时间状语：since/for 接完成时，ago 接过去时
happen / break out / belong 等不及物动词没有被动
have been to = 去过(已回)；have gone to = 去了(没回)
each / every / the number of 接单数动词
介词后、enjoy/finish 后用 doing；to do 表目的
指物用 which/that，指人用 who，所属用 whose
主将从现：if 条件句用一般现在表将来
used to do=过去常；be used to doing=习惯于

m4.q: We ___ in this small town since 2015, and we still love it here.
m4.why: since + 时间点要用现在完成时 have lived；其余三个都不能和 since 2015 搭配。

m4.q: By the time the firefighters arrived, the wooden house ___ down.
m4.why: “过去某动作之前已完成”用过去完成时；房子在他们到达前就烧塌，故 had burned。

m4.q: Listen! Someone ___ at the back door. Could you go and check?
m4.why: Listen! 提示此刻正在发生，用现在进行时 is knocking。

m4.q: A serious traffic accident ___ on this road late last night.
m4.why: happen 是不及物动词，没有被动；last night 用一般过去时 happened，was/is happened 均错。

m4.q: The Second World War ___ in September 1939.
m4.why: break out（爆发）不及物、无被动；in 1939 用过去时，故 broke out。

m4.q: Your weekend plan ___ great. Let's do it together!
m4.why: sound 作系动词“听起来”不用被动、不用进行；陈述现在用 sounds。

m4.q: This old bike is broken. It really needs ___ before the trip.
m4.why: need doing 主动形式表被动含义（= need to be done），故 repairing。

m4.q: — I can't reach Mr. Lee anywhere. — He ___ to Beijing on business and isn't back yet.
m4.why: “去了还没回”用 have gone to；have been to 表“去过已回”，与 isn't back yet 矛盾。

m4.q: — Your spoken English is amazing! — Thanks. I ___ to an English camp twice.
m4.why: twice 表经历次数用 have been to（去过）；have gone to 表“去了没回”，不能配 twice。

m4.q: Each of the new students ___ a school uniform on Monday morning.
m4.why: each of + 复数名词作主语，谓语用单数 wears。

m4.q: The number of online learners ___ growing fast these years.
m4.why: the number of …（……的数量）作主语，谓语用单数 is；a number of 才用复数。

m4.q: Neither my parents nor my little sister ___ ever been to the Great Wall.
m4.why: neither … nor … 遵循就近原则，靠近 sister（单数），用 has。

m5.q: We had walked for hours, so we stopped ___ a short rest under a tree.
m5.why: stop to do=停下来去做另一件事；这里停下来“去”休息，用 to have。stop doing 才是停止正在做的事。

m5.q: Thank you so much for ___ me with my maths these days.
m5.why: 介词 for 后接动名词 doing，故 helping。

m5.q: — Did you lock the door? — Yes, I clearly remember ___ it before we left.
m5.why: remember doing=记得做过（已发生）；门已锁，用 locking。remember to do 是记得去做（还没做）。

m5.q: The really funny story made the whole class ___ out loud.
m5.why: make sb do sth 省略 to，用动词原形 laugh。

m5.q: He gave me some advice, ___ helped me a lot in the final exam.
m5.why: 逗号后的非限制性定语从句指物只能用 which，不用 that；what 不引导定语从句。

m5.q: I have a classmate ___ father runs a small bookshop downtown.
m5.why: 先行词 classmate 与 father 是所属关系，用 whose（……的）。

m5.q: I'm really not sure ___ or not he will join our study group tomorrow.
m5.why: …or not 紧跟引导词时只能用 whether，不能用 if。

m5.q: Excuse me, could you tell me ___ the nearest subway station is?
m5.why: 宾语从句用陈述语序：where the nearest subway station is。

m5.q: If it ___ tomorrow, we will visit the science museum instead.
m5.why: if 条件状语从句“主将从现”——主句将来时，从句用一般现在 rains。

m5.q: I wish I ___ swim as well as you do; I always sink like a stone!
m5.why: wish 后表与现在事实相反的愿望，用过去式 could（虚拟语气）。

m5.q: There ___ a cinema on this corner, but it was pulled down last year.
m5.why: used to be=过去曾经是（如今不再）；be used to doing 才是“习惯于”，形式也不同。

m5.q: It was ___ heavy rain last night that the football match was put off.
m5.why: such + 不可数名词 rain；so 接形容词/副词；rain 不可数，故不能用 such a。
